def positive_python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_list_as_fifo_queue():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_list_as_fifo_queue"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag list pop(0) or insert(0, ...) queue usage where collections.deque fits the access pattern."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
